title: Roasted Indulgent Mediterranean Almonds Paella
description: A rich and flavorful Mediterranean dish featuring roasted almonds and savory paella, perfect for a special occasion. This indulgent recipe combines the best of Mediterranean cuisine with a satisfying crunch from the almonds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced almonds with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and sprinkle with salt until they are evenly coated.
Spread the almonds on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 10 minutes, or until fragrant and lightly browned.
In a large paella pan or skillet, heat the remaining olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the uncooked rice to the pan, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan, stirring to combine, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes to the pan, stirring to combine, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the roasted almonds and crumbled feta cheese, and cook until the cheese is melted and the mixture is heated through.
